examples: A long thin wool coat and a purple headscarf protected her against the wind.
My headscarf had fallen down, so I pulled it up.
"My hair is too beautiful to hide under a headscarf," she said defiantly.
He wrote: I defend absolutely the right of any woman to wear a headscarf.
Bavarian Education Minister Monika Hohlmeier said the headscarf was increasingly used as a political symbol.
